title: How to find dashboard items via Boltswitch?
excerpt: Is it possible to find Dashboard boards via Bolt switch?

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to find Dashboard boards via Bolt switch?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes you should be able to find them with the Boltswitch

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Found it, sorry, I was not looking good enough. Thanks.

How do I close a topic?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: No problem! I believe closing a topic is something only the admins and moderators can do!
